meta.title: fak persona-readiness scorecard — is each top persona served?
meta._doc: Each row is one of the top-10 personas who land on fak, scored on whether the affordances that persona reaches for first actually exist in the tree. The scorecard cross-checks every affordance against the real tree (a path that exists, a doc that mentions a token, a command that resolves, a CLAIMS section that is tagged), so the score cannot be gamed by editing data alone: to lift a persona you ADD the real affordance. Regenerate the doc: python tools/persona_readiness_scorecard.py --markdown-dir docs/persona-scorecard

tiers.name: Consume / build-on

tiers.name: Operate / trust
tiers.note: deploy it, secure it, run it in production

tiers.note: reproduce it, benchmark it, decide to adopt

tiers.name: Contribute / extend
tiers.note: add a leaf, or be the agent that builds on it
